name: Wam Alternative Assets Limited
analysis: WMA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.9850, stop A$0.9405, target A$1.1185 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
